ab: Aniwaw, i luma’ tu haw kisu?
en: Aniw, are you home?

ab: Hay, initu picumudi.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Aniwaw, i luma’ tu haw kisu?
en: Aniw, are you home?

ab: Awaay i luma’ ci Aniw, ci Lipay kaku. A mimaan saw? Sasuwal hanaw tu aku ci Aniw anu taluma’.
ch: B:Aniw不在家耶!我是Lipay，有什麼事嗎?回來我會轉告Aniw。
en: Aniw is not at home. I am Lipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: Cima saw kamu?
en: Who are you?

ab: Vayiaw, ci Tipus aci Aniw kami, padangi kami a mivuhat tu panan!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Tipus和Aniw，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Tipus and Aniw, please open the door for us.

ab: Cima saw kamu hani?
en: Who is it?

ab: Ci Puyar kaku, tayniyay kaku a mikilim ci Laisan.
en: I am Puyar, I am here for Lais.

ab: Vayiaw, tayniyay kaku a milisu’ i tisuwan.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Matenestu a caay katayni kisu, maurun tu aca kaku i tisuwan.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Aniw, initu kaku.
en: Aniw, I am here to play with you.

ab: Picumudi, mitalaaytu kaku i tisuwan.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Tanamen may! u nipaluma nu maku a vunga kiniyan.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Cuperas kina vunga.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Kati! kaenen saw! U nipalumaan nu maku a lusay kiniyan.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Sicedam kina lusay.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Kamaru’ ! Kaenen saw! U nipalumaan nu maku a taviras kiniyan.
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Emm ! U ruma ku sicedam nina taviras haw.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: Mangalay haw kisu a kemaen tu kama?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: A caay hen kaku kakemaen tu kama, ka u linko hanaw.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: Mangalay haw kisu a kemaen tu piyang?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Hay, u kaulahan aku.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Puhci’ay hen nu kaku ku lusay tu sapakaen i tisuwan.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Ay haw! Tanusalang saan kina lusay.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Panamumay nu maku kisu.
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Aray.
en: Thank you.

ab: Saadihayen ku nikaen, adihay ku nicacakan nu maku tu sinavel.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Ay! Savangsis saan, saalesu’ aca a kaenen.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: Dupuhi a kemaen, adihay hen itini.
en: Enjoy yourself.  There is a lot more.

ab: A caay kangudu kaku yu!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: Dupuhi a kemaen, adihay hen itini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Adihaytu ku nikaen nu maku, hamanan tu.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
